orchestrated_campaign.label: Orchestrated Campaign
orchestrated_campaign.description: Batch/multi-step campaign workflows scheduled to run on a population. These map to AJO Orchestrated Campaigns.
indicators: Has a query or readAudience activity (batch audience selection)
Has enrichment, deduplication, union, intersection, exclusion, or reconciliation activities
Has split activity for audience branching
Has a delivery or channelAction activity (email, SMS, push, direct mail)
Has join/andJoin activity for merging branches
Has fork activity for splitting execution paths
Has wait or scheduler activity (time-based flow control)
Runs on a schedule or processes a batch population

journey.label: Journey
journey.description: Event-driven / 1:1 real-time workflows triggered by individual profile signals. These map to AJO Journeys, not Orchestrated Campaigns.
indicators: Triggered by a real-time signal or external event (signal activity)
Very few activities — typically start → wait/action → end with no audience building
No batch audience-building activities (no query, enrichment, deduplication)
Designed for real-time individual profile triggers, not a batch population

unsupported.label: Unsupported
unsupported.description: Workflows that cannot be migrated to AJO due to unsupported activity types or operations.
indicators: Contains file operations: fileImport, fileExport, writer, extract, fileCollector
Contains scripting or custom code: javascript, execJs, wfMgt
Contains server or transfer operations: nlserver, transfer, ftp, sftp
Contains approval, alert, or manual task activities
Contains web download or HTTP call activities: webDownload, httpRequest
